THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PHOTO, INC. SIN, WENDY ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $986.74 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $986.74, DEFS. GRANTED THEIR LEAGALLY RECOVERABLE COSTS.
